meaning: n.恒河猴(一种猕猴,多用于实验)
examples: Caloric-restriction projects underway in two species more closely related to humans—rhesus and squirrel monkeys—have made scientists optimistic that CR mimetics could help people.
But this photo is not [of] a rhesus monkey.
He and his colleagues trained two rhesus monkeys to follow a moving target on a computer screen.
The U.S. space program launched a rhesus monkey into space from New Mexico in 1948.
Pictures of the bundled-up rhesus macaque were spread around the world by social media.
